CreateDedicatedChannelBfd.clientToken: Idempotency token, an ASCII string of up to 64 characters. See [ClientToken Idempotency](#idempotency).
CreateDedicatedChannelBfd.etId: The ID of the dedicated line.
CreateDedicatedChannelBfd.etChannelId: The ID of the dedicated line channel.
CreateDedicatedChannelBfd.sendInterval: Packet sending interval, an integer between 200 and 1000 (in ms), recommended value is 300.
CreateDedicatedChannelBfd.receivInterval: Packet receiving interval, an integer between 200 and 1000 (in ms), recommended value is 300.
CreateDedicatedChannelBfd.detectMultiplier: Detection time multiplier, an integer between 3 and 10, recommended value is 4.
